## Livros Escritos

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="25%"}
```{r}
knitr::include_graphics('figs/CAPAdigital-AnaliseDadosR.jpg')
```
:::

::: {.column width="25%"}
```{r}
knitr::include_graphics('figs/COVER-AnalyzinDataR-ebook.jpg')
```
:::

::: {.column width="25%"}
```{r}
knitr::include_graphics('figs/CAPA-VisualizacaoDadosR-EBOOK.jpg')
```
:::

::: {.column width="25%"}
```{r}
knitr::include_graphics('figs/CAPA_Marcelo_RendaFixa_2022.jpg')
```
:::

::::

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="25%"}
```{r}
knitr::include_graphics('figs/CAPA-Questoes-de-R-EBOOK.jpg')
```

:::

::: {.column width="25%"}
```{r}
knitr::include_graphics('figs/CAPA-Introducao-ao-R-ebook.jpg')
```
:::

::: {.column width="25%"}

:::

::: {.column width="25%"}

:::

::::


Links disponíveis na [página pessoal](https://msperlin.com/publication/#5)
